question: Provide a brief company overview, including employee count, office footprint, and where customer data is hosted.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Company profile
evidence.text: Relay Field Systems, Inc. (Delaware C-corp) — B2B SaaS work-order dispatch & technician scheduling for mid-market trade contractors (HVAC, electrical, plumbing). 85 employees. Hybrid — Denver HQ, ~60% remote.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Hosting & environments
evidence.text: Cloud provider: Microsoft Azure — East US 2 primary, Central US for DR. Production, staging, and dev in separate Azure subscriptions with separate VNets.

question: List all security certifications and attestations currently held (e.g., SOC 2, ISO 27001), including report dates and any noted exceptions.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Certifications & assessments
evidence.text: SOC 2 Type II: report issued 2026-02, covering 2025-01 through 2025-12. One exception noted (change-management evidence gap), remediated Q3 2025.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Certifications & assessments
evidence.text: ISO 27001: not held — certification targeted for 2027.

question: Describe encryption of customer data at rest and in transit, including key management and rotation. Do you support customer-managed keys (CMK)?

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Encryption
evidence.text: AES-256 (Azure Storage encryption / SQL TDE). Keys in Azure Key Vault; annual automatic rotation.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Encryption
evidence.text: TLS 1.2 minimum; TLS 1.3 preferred. HSTS on all public endpoints. No exceptions.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Encryption
evidence.text: Supported on Enterprise tier via customer-held Azure Key Vault.

question: Is single sign-on with multi-factor authentication enforced for all employees and contractors? Name your identity provider.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Access control & identity
evidence.text: Microsoft Entra ID, MFA enforced for all employees and contractors. FIDO2 keys required for admins.

question: Describe your access review cadence and the timeline for revoking access upon employee termination.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Access control & identity
evidence.text: Quarterly; privileged roles reviewed monthly.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Access control & identity
evidence.text: Access revocation within 8 business hours via Entra lifecycle workflows.

question: Describe your penetration testing program: frequency, most recent test date, performing firm, and remediation of critical/high findings.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Certifications & assessments
evidence.text: Annual. Most recent test 2026-01 by Kestrel Security. No critical findings; one high (SSRF in webhook handler) remediated in 21 days, retest confirmed.

question: What is your log retention period? Can retention be extended beyond 12 months upon customer request?

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Logging & monitoring
evidence.text: Retention: 13 months.

gaps.sub_question: Can retention be extended beyond 12 months upon customer request?
gaps.detail: Extended retention per customer request is NOT documented — identified gap during onboarding (Onboarding Interview, Q16).

question: Do you maintain a documented incident response plan? What is your customer notification commitment following a confirmed breach?

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Incident response
evidence.text: Documented IR plan v3.1 with severity matrix and 24/7 on-call.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Incident response
evidence.text: Customer notification within 72 hours of a confirmed breach involving their data.

question: Describe your backup strategy and RTO/RPO targets. Provide the date and results of your most recent disaster recovery test.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Business continuity & disaster recovery
evidence.text: Continuous geo-redundant replication plus nightly encrypted backups. Targets: RTO 12 hours / RPO 1 hour.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Business continuity & disaster recovery
evidence.text: Last DR failover test 2026-03-19: passed, production restored in Central US in 9h40m. Restore tests run quarterly.

question: Do you perform background checks on new hires? Identify the screening vendor and the scope of checks performed.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — People security
evidence.text: Background checks on all new hires via Sterling — criminal, identity, employment (US).

question: Describe endpoint protections on employee devices (MDM, disk encryption, EDR).

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Endpoint security
evidence.text: Microsoft Intune MDM on all devices.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Endpoint security
evidence.text: BitLocker/FileVault full-disk encryption.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Endpoint security
evidence.text: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint EDR fleet-wide.

question: Provide a current list of subprocessors with access to customer data. Is a Data Processing Agreement available?

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Subprocessors
evidence.text: Microsoft Azure (hosting), Stripe (billing), Twilio (SMS dispatch), HubSpot (CRM/support), Google Workspace (email/docs).

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Subprocessors
evidence.text: DPA with GDPR SCCs available on request. CCPA via privacy@relayfield.example.

question: Have you appointed a Data Protection Officer? Describe your GDPR and CCPA compliance measures.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Data handling
evidence.text: Work orders, technician schedules, customer site addresses/contacts, usage analytics. No PHI, no cardholder data (payments handled by Stripe), no children's data.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Data handling
evidence.text: Life of contract + 60 days, then purged. On request within 30 days with written confirmation.

evidence.source: Relay Field Systems Trust Corpus — Subprocessors
evidence.text: DPA with GDPR SCCs available on request. CCPA via privacy@relayfield.example.

gaps.sub_question: Have you appointed a Data Protection Officer?
gaps.detail: Not specifically addressed in the Relay corpus. No mention of a DPO appointment.

question: State your cyber liability insurance carrier and per-incident coverage amount.

gaps.sub_question: Cyber liability insurance carrier and per-incident coverage amount
gaps.detail: No evidence in corpus. Legal/insurance details are human-only domain.

question: Will you agree to indemnify the customer for losses arising from a breach of your systems? Describe your standard contractual terms.

gaps.sub_question: Indemnification terms for breach of systems
gaps.detail: No evidence in corpus. Legal/contractual terms are human-only domain.
